text: Refactor a 5,000-line legacy Python service into modular packages with full type hints and 90% test coverage.

pipeline_stages.description: Analyze the existing 5,000-line codebase to understand structure, dependencies, and patterns
Design and implement modular package architecture with dependency injection and clear interfaces
Add comprehensive type hints (PEP 484) throughout the refactored code
Write unit and integration tests to achieve 90% code coverage

text: Write a regex in JavaScript that matches UK postcodes.
expect: Cheap fast model (Haiku / Gemini Flash / Mistral Small)

text: I have a flaky integration test in our Node.js CI; help me identify likely race conditions.

suggested_questions.question: Can you share the test code and a sample of the failure logs?
options: Yes, I can paste the code
I can describe the test but not paste it
I need help setting up the analysis first

suggested_questions.question: Does the flakiness happen randomly, or in specific scenarios?

pipeline_stages.description: Extract test code, async patterns, shared state, and timing-sensitive operations
Identify potential race conditions: unhandled promise chains, missing await, shared mutable state, timing assumptions, event handler ordering
Propose fixes: proper await/async, locks/mutexes, test isolation, deterministic ordering

text: Build a React + Tailwind dashboard component that visualises time-series metrics with brushing and zoom.
Summarise this 3-paragraph press release into a tweet.
Summarise a 200-page board report into a 2-page exec brief, preserving numerical figures exactly.
Summarise weekly Zoom meeting transcripts (~30k tokens each) into action items.
Extract line items, totals and VAT from scanned PDF invoices.
Pull all email addresses and phone numbers out of a 50-page contract.
Convert messy free-text product reviews into JSON with sentiment, topics and aspect ratings.
Write a 1500-word short story in the style of Ursula K Le Guin about an AI that learns to garden.
Draft 5 LinkedIn posts announcing a new B2B SaaS feature, varied in tone.
Write a polite follow-up email to a client who has not replied for 2 weeks.
Generate a 20-page market-research report on the UK ed-tech sector with citations and charts described.

suggested_questions.question: Do you have existing research materials or data to draw from, or should the model research from general knowledge?
options: I have source materials to provide
Use general knowledge and public data
Both – I'll provide some sources plus fill gaps

suggested_questions.question: What's the primary audience for this report?

pipeline_stages.description: Research and analyse UK ed-tech sector trends, market size, key players, growth drivers, and competitive landscape
Synthesise analysis into structured 20-page report with executive summary, sections, findings, and recommendations
Generate descriptions of charts, visualisations, and cite sources throughout the report

text: Analyse this CSV of 10k customer transactions and identify churn predictors.

suggested_questions.question: What format is your CSV in, and do you have labels for churned vs. active customers?
options: No labels, need to infer from behavior

suggested_questions.question: Do you want just correlation analysis, or predictive model building?
options: Build a predictive model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree)

pipeline_stages.description: Parse and validate CSV; handle missing values, outliers, and data quality issues
Exploratory data analysis: compute correlations, statistical tests, identify patterns in churned vs. active cohorts
Build and train predictive model; feature engineering; evaluate feature importance
Summarize findings and recommendations in a report with visualizations and actionable insights

text: Review a 40-page commercial lease and flag clauses that are unusual or risky for the tenant.
Solve this system of nonlinear PDEs symbolically and explain the steps.

pipeline_stages.description: Parse and set up the system of nonlinear PDEs using symbolic mathematics library (e.g., SymPy, Mathematica)
Attempt symbolic solution using available methods (separation of variables, Fourier transforms, numerical approximation if needed)
Analyze solution validity, convergence, and special cases
Generate clear step-by-step explanation of the solution process

text: Help me think through whether to expand into the German market — pros, cons, risks.

suggested_questions.question: What industry or sector is your business in?
Do you have existing market entry research or data to work from?

text: Translate this technical white paper from English into Brazilian Portuguese, preserving terminology.

suggested_questions.question: Do you have a glossary or list of preferred technical terms for this domain?

text: Translate 200 short product descriptions from English to French daily.
Build a chatbot that tutors GCSE maths students step-by-step.
expect: Mid-tier with reasoning (Sonnet / Gemini Pro / GPT-5.4 mini)

suggested_questions.question: What's your delivery method preference?
Should the chatbot handle symbolic maths, or text-based explanations only?
options: Include step-by-step worked solutions with diagrams

suggested_questions.question: Do you need to track student progress/analytics, or just conversation?

pipeline_stages.description: Set up chatbot framework and conversation management system
Craft prompts and response templates for step-by-step tutoring pedagogy
Evaluate student responses and determine next tutoring steps
Integrate with backend (data storage, logging, optional analytics)

text: A reflective journaling companion that asks gentle follow-up questions.
Classify product photos into 30 categories from an e-commerce catalogue.
expect: Vision capable cheap (Gemini Flash / Haiku vision)

suggested_questions.question: How many product photos do you need to classify?
Do you have labeled training examples or a reference catalogue?

text: OCR handwritten doctor notes from scanned charts into searchable text.
Extract text from these 100 scanned receipts then categorise the spending and produce a monthly summary.

pipeline_stages.description: OCR / text extraction from 100 scanned receipt images
Parse extracted text to pull structured data (date, vendor, amount, category hints)
Categorise spending by merchant/category and aggregate into monthly summary
Produce formatted monthly spending summary report

text: Translate this Japanese research paper into English then write a 1-page lay summary.

pipeline_stages.description: Translate the Japanese research paper into English, preserving technical terminology and scientific accuracy.
Condense the translated paper into a 1-page lay summary, making it accessible to a non-specialist audience.

text: Read our codebase, generate API docs, and translate them into Spanish.

suggested_questions.question: How large is your codebase?
Do you want the Spanish docs to maintain code examples in English, or translate those too?

pipeline_stages.description: Read and analyse the codebase to understand API structure, functions, parameters, and return types
Generate comprehensive API documentation in English with clear descriptions, usage examples, and parameter details
Translate the generated API documentation from English to Spanish while preserving technical terminology and code examples

text: Help me with AI stuff.

suggested_questions.question: What do you want to use AI for?
Do you have specific content or files you want to work with?
Is this a one-off task or something you'll do regularly?

text: Process patient medical records to identify high-risk cases — must run on-prem with zero data egress.

suggested_questions.question: What format are the medical records in?
What defines 'high-risk' for your use case?
Do you need real-time processing or batch?

pipeline_stages.description: Parse and extract key clinical entities from medical records (diagnoses, lab values, medications, vital signs)
Apply risk stratification logic and reasoning against clinical criteria to identify high-risk cases
Generate risk reports/alerts with explanations and recommended actions

text: Build a chatbot that handles English, Arabic, Mandarin and Swahili customer queries.

suggested_questions.question: What's the primary use case? (e.g., customer support, sales, FAQ)
Do you need to build this from scratch or integrate with existing systems?
options: Deploy on specific platform (Slack, WhatsApp, etc.)

suggested_questions.question: Should the chatbot handle context across multiple turns, or single-query responses?

pipeline_stages.description: Set up chatbot framework and integrate multilingual language detection/routing
Design conversation flows and response templates for each language
Implement backend integration (APIs, databases, business logic)
Test, evaluate response quality across languages, and optimize

text: Build an agent that can browse the web, run code, and call our internal API to schedule meetings.

suggested_questions.question: What framework or runtime do you want to use?
Do you need help with the full implementation, or just architecture/design?
Should the agent handle authentication to your internal API?

pipeline_stages.description: Design and scaffold the agent architecture with tool bindings for web browsing, code execution, and API calls
Implement tool definitions and integrations (web search/browsing, sandboxed execution, API client)
Build agent orchestration logic with reasoning loop and error handling
Review security, reliability, and performance considerations

text: A voice assistant that responds in under 200ms.

suggested_questions.question: What should the assistant do?
Is the 200ms latency constraint for the full round-trip (including network), or just the model inference?
Should this run on-device or cloud-based?

pipeline_stages.description: Speech-to-text (transcribe audio input)
Intent recognition and response generation
Text-to-speech (synthesize audio response)
